name: Cohere API
what_it_does: Enterprise-focused LLM API specializing in RAG, embeddings, and reranking with Command R models optimized for retrieval-augmented generation.
use_cases: RAG pipelines using Command R+ with grounded generation and citation support
Semantic search and document retrieval using Embed v3 embeddings
Reranking search results for relevance using Rerank API
Tool use / function calling with structured JSON responses
Multi-step agentic workflows with the Chat API and tool definitions
not_for: Simple chat applications where GPT-4o or Claude would suffice
Teams needing the most cutting-edge reasoning models
best_when: Building enterprise RAG systems that need best-in-class embeddings and reranking alongside generation, with citation tracking.
avoid_when: You need multimodal capabilities or the absolute highest reasoning quality for complex agentic tasks.

auth.notes: Single API key per account; trial keys rate-limited; production keys require paid plan. Keys passed as Bearer token in Authorization header.

pricing.paid_tiers: Command R: $0.15/1M input, $0.60/1M output; Command R+: $2.50/1M input, $10/1M output; Embed v3: $0.10/1M tokens; Rerank: $2/1000 searches
pricing.notes: Separate pricing for Generate, Embed, and Rerank endpoints. Enterprise plans available with private deployment options.

performance.rate_limits: Trial: 5 RPM; Production: varies by tier, typically 10000 RPM for paid

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear error messages with error_codes; rate limit headers included in responses
known_agent_gotchas: Tool calling response format differs from OpenAI — tool_calls are in tool_calls array with separate tool_use_id tracking
Grounded generation with documents returns citations array — parse carefully for source attribution
Rerank API returns results in relevance-score order, not original order — index field tracks original position
Command R vs Command R+ have significantly different quality and cost; R+ needed for complex reasoning
Trial keys silently fail after quota exceeded; check response for error vs content

security_score_components.security_notes: API key only, no scopes. Private deployment available for enterprise. SOC2 Type II certified.
